queries.question: What initiatives are common across all community development corporations?
queries.sql: SELECT Initiatives.initiative_name  from Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives join Initiatives on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id = Initiatives.id join Community_Development_Corporations on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id = Community_Development_Corporations.id   GROUP BY Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Community_Development_Corporations)

queries.question: Show me the information about the initiatives that are applicable to all areas at the same time (names and descriptions).
queries.sql: SELECT Initiatives.initiative_name, Initiatives.description  from Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives join Initiatives on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id = Initiatives.id join Community_Development_Corporations on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id = Community_Development_Corporations.id   GROUP BY Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Community_Development_Corporations)

queries.question: Provide the description of initiatives that is common for all community development corporations.
queries.sql: SELECT Initiatives.description  from Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives join Initiatives on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id = Initiatives.id join Community_Development_Corporations on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id = Community_Development_Corporations.id   GROUP BY Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Community_Development_Corporations)

queries.question: Show me the information about the initiatives available in each area (names and descriptions).
queries.sql: select community_development_corporations.name , initiatives.initiative_name , initiatives.description from Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives join Initiatives on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id = Initiatives.id join Community_Development_Corporations on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id = Community_Development_Corporations.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?initiative_name ?description WHERE {
  ?community_development_corporations_initiatives a :Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives .
  ?initiatives a :Initiatives .
  ?community_development_corporations_initiatives p:hasInitiatives ?initiatives .
  ?community_development_corporations a :Community_Development_Corporations .
  ?community_development_corporations_initiatives p:hasCommunity_Development_Corporations ?community_development_corporations .
  ?community_development_corporations p:name ?name .
  ?initiatives p:initiative_name ?initiative_name .
  ?initiatives p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For every community development corporation, present the corresponding description of its initiatives.
queries.sql: select community_development_corporations.name , initiatives.description from Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives join Initiatives on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.initiative_id = Initiatives.id join Community_Development_Corporations on Community_Development_Corporations_Initiatives.community_development_corporation_id = Community_Development_Corporations.id

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What initiatives are there for every community development corporation?
Show me the information about the initiatives available in each area (names and descriptions).
What description of initiatives is available for each community development corporation?
